description_long: This is a medium-sized dog with a sturdy, muscular build and a thick, plush coat that appears predominantly white with subtle hints of cream and light brown. The dog has a broad head, a pointed muzzle, and pricked, triangular ears that stand upright, giving it an alert expression. Its tail is bushy and tightly curled over its back, a characteristic feature of certain northern breeds. The legs are straight and strong, supporting a well-proportioned body. There are visible surface imperfections and rough patches, suggesting some wear or damage. No collar or leash is visible, and the dog stands in a natural, attentive pose.
description: A sturdy, medium-sized dog with a thick white coat, pricked ears, and a curled tail, resembling a northern spitz breed. The surface shows some roughness and imperfections.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dog's alert face, upright ears, and broad chest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the dog's muscular body, curled tail, and pricked ears.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tightly curled tail over the back and the dog's hindquarters.
description_view_3: Right rear angle showing the bushy tail, thick coat, and side profile of the head and ears.
